name: chrome
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${chromePath}='C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe'; ${log}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\chrome-verify.log'; if (Test-Path ${chromePath}) { Set-Content -Path ${log} -Value 'Chrome installed successfully'; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\chrome-smoke.txt') -Value 'chrome_ok' } else { 'Chrome executable not found at ' + ${chromePath} | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
